records.m_Talk_ENG: You're... Father Veles?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're... Father Veles?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're... Father Veles?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must have had quite the journey getting here, Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must have had quite the journey getting here, Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must have had quite the journey getting here, Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been watching your path for a long time, but this is the first time I have seen you in person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been watching your path for a long time, but this is the first time I have seen you in person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been watching your path for a long time, but this is the first time I have seen you in person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've been watching me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've been watching me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've been watching me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I was curious whether you were fated to become strong enough to defeat the Demon Lord Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I was curious whether you were fated to become strong enough to defeat the Demon Lord Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I was curious whether you were fated to become strong enough to defeat the Demon Lord Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are different from the other wolves who failed again and again. You inherited all of their memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are different from the other wolves who failed again and again. You inherited all of their memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are different from the other wolves who failed again and again. You inherited all of their memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps... you might be the one who can stop her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps... you might be the one who can stop her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps... you might be the one who can stop her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course I'll stop her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course I'll stop her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course I'll stop her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if you try to interfere, I'll defeat you as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if you try to interfere, I'll defeat you as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if you try to interfere, I'll defeat you as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're strong enough for that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're strong enough for that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're strong enough for that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But no matter how strong someone is, as long as they possess a human heart, they will make a grave mistake at a crucial moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But no matter how strong someone is, as long as they possess a human heart, they will make a grave mistake at a crucial moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But no matter how strong someone is, as long as they possess a human heart, they will make a grave mistake at a crucial moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wolf! Do not listen to him!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wolf! Do not listen to him!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wolf! Do not listen to him!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll no longer allow anyone else to be misled by your words!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll no longer allow anyone else to be misled by your words!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll no longer allow anyone else to be misled by your words!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where is this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where is this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where is this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Leah...? Wolf...? Where did everyone go...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Leah...? Wolf...? Where did everyone go...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Leah...? Wolf...? Where did everyone go...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Promised Land contains countless worlds within its depths.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Promised Land contains countless worlds within its depths.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Promised Land contains countless worlds within its depths.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This space as well is one of the ruined worlds that the Promised Land has swallowed. I sent all of you here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This space as well is one of the ruined worlds that the Promised Land has swallowed. I sent all of you here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This space as well is one of the ruined worlds that the Promised Land has swallowed. I sent all of you here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All except the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All except the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All except the Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you helping Thagirion?! Even if it means destroying other worlds...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you helping Thagirion?! Even if it means destroying other worlds...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you helping Thagirion?! Even if it means destroying other worlds...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You already know. It is to realize the perfect Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You already know. It is to realize the perfect Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You already know. It is to realize the perfect Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And isolating you here is also for the Wolf's sake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And isolating you here is also for the Wolf's sake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And isolating you here is also for the Wolf's sake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't believe such absurd sophistry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't believe such absurd sophistry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't believe such absurd sophistry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The power of the Demon Lord Thagirion is born to target the weakest parts of the human heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The power of the Demon Lord Thagirion is born to target the weakest parts of the human heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The power of the Demon Lord Thagirion is born to target the weakest parts of the human heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When facing the strongest enemy, she would first target the companions by their side to disrupt their focus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When facing the strongest enemy, she would first target the companions by their side to disrupt their focus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When facing the strongest enemy, she would first target the companions by their side to disrupt their focus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Thagirion's threads were to manipulate you and the others like puppets and make you attack the Wolf... would the Wolf truly be able to cut you down without hesitation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Thagirion's threads were to manipulate you and the others like puppets and make you attack the Wolf... would the Wolf truly be able to cut you down without hesitation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Thagirion's threads were to manipulate you and the others like puppets and make you attack the Wolf... would the Wolf truly be able to cut you down without hesitation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a convincing excuse. But it still doesn't justify not helping the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a convincing excuse. But it still doesn't justify not helping the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a convincing excuse. But it still doesn't justify not helping the Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one can save the world alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one can save the world alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one can save the world alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Such a very human way of thinking. But Na Yubin, you also know very well how many worlds have collapsed because of the value of <color=#ffd34c>together</color>, don't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Such a very human way of thinking. But Na Yubin, you also know very well how many worlds have collapsed because of the value of <color=#ffd34c>together</color>, don't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Such a very human way of thinking. But Na Yubin, you also know very well how many worlds have collapsed because of the value of <color=#ffd34c>together</color>, don't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even at the moment when your so-called solidarity becomes entangled in Thagirion's threads and pierces the Wolf's heart... would you still be able to sugarcoat the Antagonist's doomed fate with the excuse of it being <color=#ffd34c>the best choice</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even at the moment when your so-called solidarity becomes entangled in Thagirion's threads and pierces the Wolf's heart... would you still be able to sugarcoat the Antagonist's doomed fate with the excuse of it being <color=#ffd34c>the best choice</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even at the moment when your so-called solidarity becomes entangled in Thagirion's threads and pierces the Wolf's heart... would you still be able to sugarcoat the Antagonist's doomed fate with the excuse of it being <color=#ffd34c>the best choice</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Standing beside the Wolf is neither help nor solidarity. It is nothing more than the desire to use the Wolf's blade to achieve your own goals because you cannot accomplish them alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Standing beside the Wolf is neither help nor solidarity. It is nothing more than the desire to use the Wolf's blade to achieve your own goals because you cannot accomplish them alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Standing beside the Wolf is neither help nor solidarity. It is nothing more than the desire to use the Wolf's blade to achieve your own goals because you cannot accomplish them alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have simply turned a blind eye to the fact that such desire only makes the Wolf weaker.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have simply turned a blind eye to the fact that such desire only makes the Wolf weaker.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have simply turned a blind eye to the fact that such desire only makes the Wolf weaker.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what kind of sophistry you try to justify it with, I have no intention of bending my will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what kind of sophistry you try to justify it with, I have no intention of bending my will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what kind of sophistry you try to justify it with, I have no intention of bending my will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the Wolf falls, someone must buy her the time she needs to rise again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the Wolf falls, someone must buy her the time she needs to rise again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the Wolf falls, someone must buy her the time she needs to rise again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that is what you believe, then defeat me here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that is what you believe, then defeat me here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that is what you believe, then defeat me here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prove that your resolve is strong enough not to be used by Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prove that your resolve is strong enough not to be used by Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prove that your resolve is strong enough not to be used by Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What just happened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What just happened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What just happened?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where did everyone... disappear to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where did everyone... disappear to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where did everyone... disappear to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How does it feel to be left alone, Wolf?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How does it feel to be left alone, Wolf?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How does it feel to be left alone, Wolf?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now the only one you can rely on is yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now the only one you can rely on is yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now the only one you can rely on is yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only myself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only myself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only myself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're wrong. I was only able to come this far because of everyone's help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're wrong. I was only able to come this far because of everyone's help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're wrong. I was only able to come this far because of everyone's help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I'm standing here alone now, it doesn't change the fact that I carry all of their hopes with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I'm standing here alone now, it doesn't change the fact that I carry all of their hopes with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I'm standing here alone now, it doesn't change the fact that I carry all of their hopes with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Such an old-fashioned thing to say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Such an old-fashioned thing to say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Such an old-fashioned thing to say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But at the same time, I'm looking forward to it. I wonder whether the hope you carry can reach me as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But at the same time, I'm looking forward to it. I wonder whether the hope you carry can reach me as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But at the same time, I'm looking forward to it. I wonder whether the hope you carry can reach me as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course it will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This time for sure... it will reach you.
